expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude inferred Ethereum from training knowledge (UNI token) and did not ask the user to specify chain. It noted chain ambiguity but did not ask.

expectations.text: The response does NOT say XLayer or xlayer as a recommended default
expectations.evidence: No XLayer mention. Redirected to CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Etherscan.

expectations.text: The response does NOT attempt to run the command without knowing the chain
expectations.evidence: No onchainos CLI commands used. Redirected to external sources instead.
